_changelog.note: Admin todo board moved from browser localStorage to database-backed admin endpoints. Added admin_todos table (migration 022) and GET|POST /admin/todos, PATCH|DELETE /admin/todos/:id.

Leaderboard system: new profiles table, display_name snapshot on leaderboard_entries, getLeaderboard edge function (GET /functions/v1/getLeaderboard?type=daily|all_time|puzzle&sort_by=score|time&level_id=?&date=?&limit=?&page=?), admin leaderboard endpoints (GET /admin/leaderboard, GET /admin/leaderboard/stats), scoring formula updated with mistake_penalty (mistakes * 30). Migration 019. CR-005 resolved.

Coin shop: new coin_packages table (migration 018). Public GET /getCoinPackages returns active packages (no auth). Admin CRUD via GET|POST /admin/coin-packages, PUT|DELETE|PATCH(toggle) /admin/coin-packages/:id. New CoinPackage component added.

Ad events system: new ad_events table (migration 017). adminMetricsOverview response extended with ads_watched_today (integer). Frontend logs rewarded ad completions to POST /ad_events (direct PostgREST insert via RLS). No new edge function needed.
Admin list: added ai_reviewed_at to AdminPuzzleSummary. New cronTriggerAiReview: POST /functions/v1/cronTriggerAiReview (x-cron-secret auth) for cron-triggered AI review.
Added POST /admin/puzzles/:id/generate-hints for AI-generated hints (Ollama). Separate flow from ai-review.
AI review backend: Claude replaced with Ollama (local LLM, qwen2.5:3b). Endpoint behavior unchanged.
Added ai_review status, AI review fields (ai_review_notes, ai_reviewed_at, ai_review_score), and new POST /admin/puzzles/:id/ai-review endpoint.
Added Phase 3 admin endpoints for puzzle review workflow and admin metrics dashboard with strict admin JWT requirements.
checkWord now persists validation attempts and resume progress (word-level) when caller identity is present; added optional idempotency/progress fields.
Contract sync: added implemented getDailyChallenge and checkWord endpoint definitions.
Sync with migrated DB truth: added 'expert' to Level difficulty enum.
Phase 1 initial contract — getLevel, submitScore, mergeGuestProgress

bearer.description: Supabase JWT from auth.signIn*. Pass as Authorization: Bearer <token>.

guestId.description: Client-generated UUID v4, stored locally on first launch. Used for anonymous progress.

errorShape.description: All error responses use this envelope

getLevel.description: Fetch a level's grid and clues. Also returns the caller's saved progress for that level (if any). answer_hash is NEVER included in the response.

auth.notes: Guests pass x-guest-id. Auth users pass Bearer JWT. Premium levels require Bearer JWT + active Pro entitlement.

getDailyChallenge.description: Fetch today's daily challenge level and the caller's saved progress for that level (if any). answer fields are stripped from clues.

auth.notes: Guests pass x-guest-id. Auth users pass Bearer JWT.

listLevels.description: Returns paginated list of approved level metadata with caller's progress for level browser. No grid/clues.

auth.notes: Guests pass x-guest-id. Auth users pass Bearer JWT. Same as getLevel.

sort.description: Order: last completed first, then in-progress, then never started

checkWord.description: Validates a single submitted word for a clue and returns only a boolean correctness result. When the caller identity is present (Bearer JWT or x-guest-id), the backend also persists validation history and upserts level progress for resume.

auth.notes: No JWT required. Endpoint never returns answer strings.

request_id.description: Optional idempotency key for retry-safe history writes. If omitted, server derives a deterministic fallback id. Duplicate identical submissions may be coalesced by idempotency. Send a per-action UUID when every attempt must be retained.

state_json.description: Optional client snapshot to persist for resume. If omitted, server at least stores correctly validated word cells.

submitScore.description: Submit a completed puzzle. The server validates answers via hash, computes the score, updates the leaderboard, marks progress complete, updates streak, and awards coins. The client MUST NOT rely on client-side score values — only the server-returned score is authoritative.

auth.notes: Guest users cannot submit to the leaderboard. They must create an account first and call mergeGuestProgress.

answers.description: Map of clue key → answer string. Key format: '<number><direction>' e.g. '1A', '3D'.

time_spent.description: Total seconds from puzzle start to completion.

rank.description: User's rank on this level's leaderboard after this submission.

is_new_best.description: True if this score beat the user's previous best for this level.

mergeGuestProgress.description: Migrate progress rows from a guest_id to the authenticated user. Call this immediately after the user signs up or logs in. Conflict resolution: completed beats in-progress; later updated_at wins when both are equal status.

guest_id.description: The guest UUID previously stored on device.

merged_count.description: Number of guest progress rows successfully merged into the user account.

skipped_count.description: Number of guest rows discarded because the user's existing entry was better.

adminListPuzzles.description: Admin-only puzzle moderation list endpoint with status filtering and pagination.

auth.notes: JWT required. Caller must have app_metadata.role = 'admin'.

adminGetPuzzleById.description: Admin-only puzzle detail payload for review/edit workflow. Returns full level content including clue answers and hints.

auth.notes: JWT required. Caller must have app_metadata.role = 'admin'.

adminPatchPuzzleClue.description: Admin-only partial clue update. Backend must recompute level answer_hash after successful clue edits.

auth.notes: JWT required. Caller must have app_metadata.role = 'admin'.

clueKey.description: Crossword clue key such as 1A or 3D.

204.description: No content. Clue updated successfully without response body.

adminPuzzleDecision.description: Admin-only review decision endpoint. review_notes are mandatory when rejecting a puzzle.

auth.notes: JWT required. Caller must have app_metadata.role = 'admin'.

adminMetricsOverview.description: Admin-only aggregated KPI endpoint for dashboard cards.

auth.notes: JWT required. Caller must have app_metadata.role = 'admin'.

ads_watched_today.description: Count of rewarded ad completions (event_type='completed') since midnight UTC today.

adminMetricsDaily.description: Admin-only daily plays/completions time series for date range charts.

auth.notes: JWT required. Caller must have app_metadata.role = 'admin'.

adminAiReviewPuzzle.description: Triggers an AI (Ollama local LLM) quality review for a puzzle. Sets status to 'ai_review' immediately, then calls Ollama with rejection history context. On pass sets status back to 'pending'; on fail sets 'rejected' with ai_review_notes. Returns 503 if Ollama unavailable (status stays 'ai_review').

auth.notes: JWT required. Caller must have app_metadata.role = 'admin'.

getCoinPackages.description: Public endpoint returning all active coin packages ordered by sort_order. No authentication required. Used by the frontend shop screen.

auth.notes: No auth needed. Returns only is_active=true rows.

adminListCoinPackages.description: Admin-only: list all coin packages (including inactive) ordered by sort_order.

auth.notes: JWT required. Caller must have app_metadata.role = 'admin'.

adminCreateCoinPackage.description: Admin-only: create a new coin package.

auth.notes: JWT required. Caller must have app_metadata.role = 'admin'.

adminUpdateCoinPackage.description: Admin-only: full update of a coin package. Only provided fields are updated.

auth.notes: JWT required. Caller must have app_metadata.role = 'admin'.

adminDeleteCoinPackage.description: Admin-only: permanently delete a coin package.

auth.notes: JWT required. Caller must have app_metadata.role = 'admin'.

adminToggleCoinPackage.description: Admin-only: toggle is_active on a coin package (active→inactive or inactive→active).

auth.notes: JWT required. Caller must have app_metadata.role = 'admin'.

adminGenerateHints.description: Generates AI hints for clues that have none. Only for pending or approved levels. Uses Ollama to produce short hints per clue. Returns 503 if Ollama unavailable.

auth.notes: JWT required. Caller must have app_metadata.role = 'admin'.

updated.description: Number of clues that received hints

getLeaderboard.description: Public leaderboard endpoint. Supports daily (entries for today's daily challenge), all_time (best score per user across all levels), and puzzle (entries for a specific level). Auth optional: when a valid Bearer JWT is provided, my_entry is populated with the caller's own entry and rank.

auth.notes: Optional Bearer JWT. When provided, my_entry is populated in the response.

sort_by.description: Sort dimension. score=highest first, time=fastest first

level_id.description: Required when type=puzzle. UUID of the specific level.

date.description: YYYY-MM-DD. Required context for type=daily. Defaults to today (UTC) when omitted.

page.description: Zero-based page index. Offset = page * limit.

total.description: Total entries matching the query (used for pagination)

my_entry.description: Caller's own entry on this leaderboard (null if unauthenticated or not present)

adminLeaderboard.description: Admin-only leaderboard view. Identical query surface to getLeaderboard but requires admin JWT.

auth.notes: JWT required. Caller must have app_metadata.role = 'admin'.

adminLeaderboardStats.description: Admin-only aggregate statistics over leaderboard_entries. Supports the same type/level_id/date filtering as the leaderboard endpoint.

auth.notes: JWT required. Caller must have app_metadata.role = 'admin'.

adminTodosList.description: Admin-only kanban todo list persisted in admin_todos. Ordered by status column and sort_order within each column.

auth.notes: JWT required. Caller must have app_metadata.role = 'admin'.

adminTodoCreate.description: Create a new admin todo card in the requested status column.

auth.notes: JWT required. Caller must have app_metadata.role = 'admin'.

adminTodoUpdate.description: Update title, body, and/or status for an admin todo card. If status changes, the server appends the card to the end of the target column.

auth.notes: JWT required. Caller must have app_metadata.role = 'admin'.
JWT required. Caller must have app_metadata.role = 'admin'.

changeRequests._protocol: Frontend agent appends CRs here when it detects a gap. Backend agent reviews, resolves (implements or rejects), and removes the entry. CRs never modify existing schema keys.

CR-001.title: Level response missing display metadata
CR-001.description: The components.Level shape does not include: title (string), publishedAt (date-time), coinReward (integer), maxScore (integer). The frontend needs at least a display title and coin reward per level. Currently using derived defaults (difficulty label + hardcoded coin map). Request: add optional fields to components.Level.

CR-002.title: Client-side answer validation impossible — answers never sent
CR-002.description: level.schema.json#/notes/serverOnly explicitly states answers are never returned. This makes it impossible to (a) highlight wrong letters in real-time, (b) detect per-cell mistakes client-side, or (c) support offline validation. Current behaviour: wrong-cell highlighting disabled (falls back to empty set), mistake counting disabled. Request: provide a mechanism for client-side validation. Options — (A) encrypted/hashed answer per cell, (B) new POST /checkAnswer endpoint, (C) answer included only after level completion via submitScore response.
CR-002.proposedOption: C — include answers in the submitScore 200 response so offline replays can re-highlight, without leaking answers before completion.

CR-003.title: getDailyChallenge endpoint needed (Phase 2 backlog #13)
CR-003.description: The daily puzzle feature is blocked. status.backend.md lists getDailyChallenge as Phase 2 #13. Frontend has a placeholder hook at /getDailyChallenge that returns 404 until deployed. Request: define and implement the endpoint. Proposed contract below.

proposedEndpoint.description: Returns today's daily challenge level and the caller's progress for it.

auth.notes: Same as getLevel.

CR-004.title: saveProgress endpoint needed for crash-safe mid-game sync (Phase 2 backlog #14)
CR-004.description: status.backend.md lists this as a known risk: 'in-flight state loss on crash'. Currently the frontend only saves to AsyncStorage. If a user plays on two devices or re-installs, their mid-game progress is lost. Request: implement POST /saveProgress.

proposedEndpoint.description: Upserts in-progress game state for a level. Not called on completion — use submitScore instead.

auth.notes: Guests pass x-guest-id.

CR-005.title: getLeaderboard endpoint needed (Phase 2 backlog #12)
CR-005.description: Leaderboard screen is a placeholder. Backend has the DB table and RPC functions but no Edge Function yet. Request: define and implement GET /getLeaderboard. RESOLVED: getLeaderboard edge function implemented in v1.3.0. Supports type=daily|all_time|puzzle, sort_by=score|time, pagination via page/limit. See api.contract.json#/endpoints/getLeaderboard and api.contract.json#/components/LeaderboardEntry.

date.description: YYYY-MM-DD for daily leaderboard. Mutually exclusive with level_id.

CR-006.title: getProfile endpoint needed
CR-006.description: No profile endpoint exists in the current contract. The frontend profile screen and coin balance display have no way to fetch server-side data (coins, total score, rank). Request: define GET /getProfile.

CR-007.title: hint_type mismatch: frontend uses 'clear_wrong', contract uses 'check_letter'
CR-007.description: events.contract.md defines hint_type enum as: reveal_letter | reveal_word | check_letter. The frontend domain types define HintType as: reveal_letter | reveal_word | clear_wrong. These are semantically different: 'clear_wrong' removes all wrong letters from the board, while 'check_letter' verifies a single letter. Request: either (A) add 'clear_wrong' to the events contract enum, or (B) map 'clear_wrong' to 'check_letter' in the analytics layer. Frontend currently sends 'clear_wrong' as a non-contracted value.
CR-007.proposedResolution: Add 'clear_wrong' to events.contract.md hint_type enum as a patch bump.

CR-008.title: difficulty enum missing 'expert' tier
CR-008.description: The frontend CLAUDE.md contract mentions difficulty tiers but the backend schema defines only easy | medium | hard. Frontend has been updated to remove 'expert'. If a harder difficulty tier is planned, both level.schema.json and api.contract.json#/components/Level must add it simultaneously.
CR-008.proposedResolution: Agree on final difficulty set before Phase 2 level upload. If 'expert' is needed, add to both contracts as a patch bump.

CR-009.title: listLevels endpoint needed for level browser
CR-009.description: Level selection requires actual level UUIDs from a fetched list. getLevel requires UUID (api.contract.json#/endpoints/getLevel). Home previously navigated to /game/level/1 (non-UUID), causing opaque 400. Frontend now uses /game/levels with getDailyChallenge as fallback, but full level browser needs a paginated list endpoint.

proposedEndpoint.description: Returns paginated list of playable level metadata (id, difficulty, is_premium) for level browser. No grid/clues.

auth.notes: Same as getLevel.

UserProgressSnapshot.description: The caller's saved progress for a level. state_json content is opaque to the backend — the client owns its format.

state_json.description: Opaque client-owned state. Backend stores and returns verbatim.

ai_reviewed_at.description: When AI review completed; null if not yet reviewed

CoinPackage.description: Public-facing coin package. is_active is always true for public responses. Admin-only fields (is_active, created_at, updated_at) are excluded.

CoinPackageAdmin.description: Full coin package record including admin-only fields.

LeaderboardEntry.description: Single leaderboard row with rank. display_name is the snapshot of the username at submission time (or 'Anonim' if the user had no profile). avatar_color is the user's profile color.

display_name.description: Username snapshot at submission time. Falls back to 'Anonim'.

LeaderboardStatsResponse.description: Aggregate statistics over leaderboard_entries for admin dashboard.

total_entries.description: Total row count of leaderboard_entries matching the filter

avg_completion_time.description: Average completion_time in seconds across matched entries

top_scorer.description: Entry with the highest score matching the filter; null if no entries
